summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V2 Power Laws Game features including achievements system, 30-chapter story mode, and category filtering. Most features working correctly with one achievement unlocking issue identified.

integration_issues.flow: Achievement unlocking after quiz session completion
integration_issues.issue: Completed full quiz session (12 questions) but no achievements unlocked - expected 'Premier Pas' and 'Apprenti' achievements to trigger

passed_tests: Home screen BADGES button navigates to /achievements route
Achievements screen displays all 20 achievements with lock icons
Category filtering works correctly (TOUS: 20, QUIZ: 9, NIVEAUX: 5, HISTOIRE: 2, MAÎTRISE: 4)
Story mode shows 'Chapitre 1 / 30' indicating 30 total chapters
Story choices work correctly with 4 options per chapter
Story progression advances correctly from chapter to chapter
Diverse story themes confirmed: royal court (ch1-10), corporate (ch11+)
XP/progress system integration visible and functional
All navigation between routes working correctly
French language content throughout the application
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix achievement unlocking logic - quiz session completion should trigger 'Premier Pas' and 'Apprenti' achievements with toast notifications. Verify checkAchievements function is being called properly after session completion.
